def process_large_dataset(source):
    total = sum(transform(record) for record in source)
    return total

def transform(record):
    return record["value"] * 2

def get_events(source):
    return (parse_event(raw) for raw in source)

def parse_event(raw):
    return {"id": raw["id"], "type": raw["event_type"]}

def count_valid(source):
    return sum(1 for item in source if item["status"] == "active")
